# AutoUAT

> Stochastic UAT/UX optimization runner that finds bugs humans miss. Point it at any web app URL - it crawls pages, generates test scenarios using adaptive sampling, and produces severity-ranked HTML reports with inline screenshots. No test code required.

## Overview

AutoUAT is a desktop application, CLI tool, and MCP server for automated user acceptance testing. It uses Playwright-based browser automation combined with AI-powered evaluation to discover bugs across browsers, viewports, and user roles that manual QA consistently misses.

Unlike Selenium, Cypress, or Playwright test suites, AutoUAT requires zero test code. You provide a URL. It discovers pages, generates scenarios, executes them across Chromium/Firefox/WebKit, and produces a shareable HTML report.

## Key Capabilities

- Zero-config URL scanning - paste a URL, get findings
- Adaptive Thompson sampling - focuses on high-yield areas automatically
- Multi-browser testing - Chromium, Firefox, WebKit simultaneously
- AI critic panel - 3-persona LLM evaluation with 2-of-3 consensus
- Deterministic evaluators - console errors, network failures, layout overflow, accessibility (axe-core), performance (LCP/CLS)
- Interactive review studio - offline HTML report with screenshot overlays and annotations
- MCP server with 11 tools for AI agent integration

## Installation

Desktop app available for macOS and Windows. CLI via npm.

```
npx autouat run --url https://example.com --scenarios 20
```

## Pricing

$39 one-time purchase. No subscription. Free updates forever. 3 device activations included.

Purchase: https://buy.polar.sh/polar_cl_Wq5KOusjR20r7FkluLa4X8bqKMdPz9ICDbkqs2tmJ8R

## Comparison

| Feature | AutoUAT | Selenium | Cypress | Playwright Test |
|---------|---------|----------|---------|-----------------|
| Test code required | No | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| Auto-discovery | Yes | No | No | No |
| AI evaluation | Yes | No | No | No |
| Multi-browser | Yes | Yes | Limited | Yes |
| Setup time | 2 min | Hours | 30 min | 30 min |
| Report generation | Built-in | Manual | Manual | Manual |

- Website: https://autouat.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/hghallTAZ/autouat

## Technical Stack

TypeScript, Playwright, Electron v40, React 19, Zod, vitest (206 tests passing)
